title: Indigofera pseudocompressa
taxonomy: Indigofera pseudocompressa is a species of flowering plant in the pea family, Fabaceae. It belongs to the genus Indigofera, which consists of tropical and subtropical plants. Indigofera pseudocompressa is native to parts of Asia and Australia. The classification of this plant places it in the tribe Indigofereae, within the subfamily Faboideae. Further classification includes the family Fabaceae, order Fabales, and class Magnoliopsida.
